key_sentences.pinyin: Nǐ kàn guò nà bù diàn yǐng ma?

key_sentences.chinese: 这部电影真有意思，你觉得呢？

key_sentences.english: This movie is really interesting; what do you think?

grammar_points.title: 动态助词「过」— Aspect Particle guò (past experience)
grammar_points.explanation: 过(guò) is placed after a verb to indicate that the speaker has had a past experience of doing something at least once. Formula: Verb + 过(guò). Negation: 没+ Verb + 过. Question: Verb + 过 + 吗? For example: 我吃过北京烤鸭。(I have eaten Peking duck before.) 我没吃过。(I have never eaten it.)

examples.pinyin: Nǐ kàn guò nà bù diàn yǐng ma?

examples.chinese: 我没去过中国，想去看看。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ méi qù guò zhōng guó, xiǎng qù kàn kàn.
examples.english: I have never been to China; I'd like to go and see it.

exercises.question: Fill in: 我吃___北京烤鸭，非常好吃。(I have eaten Peking duck; it's delicious.)
How do you say 'I have never been to Beijing'?
What does Verb + 过 express?
exercises.correct: A past experience (have done something before)
options: A past experience (have done something before)

exercises.question: What does 以前看过 mean?

mini_exercises.question: What does 过 indicate after a verb?
mini_exercises.correct: A past experience (done at least once before)
options: A past experience (done at least once before)

mini_exercises.question: Which sentence is correct?
option_pinyin: Wǒ yǐ qián kàn guò zhè bù diàn yǐng.
Wǒ yǐ qián kàn le zhè bù diàn yǐng.
Wǒ yǐ qián kàn zhe zhè bù diàn yǐng.
Wǒ kàn guò zhè bù diàn yǐng ma?

grammar_points.title: 不管...都/也... — No matter...
grammar_points.explanation: 不管（bù guǎn）...都(dōu)/也(yě)... means 'no matter... (the result is always the same)'. Formula: 不管 + [condition], 都/也 + [result]. It expresses that the result does not change regardless of the condition. For example: 不管下不下雨，我都要去。(No matter whether it rains or not, I'm going.)

examples.chinese: 不管看多少次，我都觉得很有意思。
examples.pinyin: Bù guǎn kàn duō shǎo cì, wǒ dōu jué de hěn yǒu yì si.
examples.english: No matter how many times I watch it, I always find it interesting.

examples.chinese: 不管多贵，他都要买那张票。
examples.pinyin: Bù guǎn duō guì, tā dōu yào mǎi nà zhāng piào.
examples.english: No matter how expensive, he wants to buy that ticket.

exercises.question: Which word goes in the result clause after 不管...?
Which sentence is correct?
exercises.correct: 不管天气怎么样，我都去跑步。
options: 不管天气怎么样，我都去跑步。
因为天气怎么样，我都去跑步。
不管天气怎么样，我就去跑步。
都天气怎么样，不管我去跑步。
option_pinyin: Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, wǒ dōu qù pǎo bù.
Yīn wèi tiān qì zěn me yàng, wǒ dōu qù pǎo bù.
Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, wǒ jiù qù pǎo bù.
Dōu tiān qì zěn me yàng, bù guǎn wǒ qù pǎo bù.
exercises.correct_pinyin: Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, wǒ dōu qù pǎo bù.

exercises.question: Which phrase means 'feel very interesting'?
option_pinyin: jué de hěn yǒu yì si

mini_exercises.question: What does 不管...都... express?
mini_exercises.correct: No matter the condition, the result is always the same
options: No matter the condition, the result is always the same

Suī rán tiān qì zěn me yàng, tā dōu qù pǎo bù.
Yīn wèi tiān qì zěn me yàng, tā dōu qù pǎo bù.
Bù guǎn tiān qì zěn me yàng, tā qù pǎo bù le.

grammar_points.title: 动量补语「次」— Frequency Complement ci
grammar_points.explanation: 次(cì) is a measure word for frequency, meaning 'time(s)' or 'occurrence(s)'. It is placed after a verb to indicate how many times an action has been done. Formula: Verb + 了/过 + Number + 次. For example: 我看了三次。(I watched it three times.) 我看过一次。(I have watched it once.)

examples.chinese: 我以前看过这部电影，看了两次。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ qián kàn guò zhè bù diàn yǐng, kàn le liǎng cì.
examples.english: I have seen this movie before; I watched it twice.

examples.pinyin: Tā qù guò zhōng guó sān cì le.
examples.english: He has been to China three times.

exercises.question: What does 次 mean as a measure word?
Which sentence means 'I have read this book three times'?
option_pinyin: Wǒ kàn le zhè běn shū sān cì.
Wǒ sān cì kàn le zhè běn shū.
Wǒ zhè běn shū sān cì kàn le.
Wǒ kàn zhè běn shū le sān cì.
exercises.correct_pinyin: Wǒ kàn le zhè běn shū sān cì.

exercises.question: Fill in: 我去过北京___，每次都很开心。(I have been to Beijing twice; I'm happy every time.)
What does 看了两次 mean?

mini_exercises.question: What does 次 measure after a verb?
mini_exercises.correct: The number of times an action occurred
options: The number of times an action occurred

quiz.question: Fill in: 我___觉得这部电影很有意思。(I ___ think this movie is very interesting.)
What does 看过那部电影 mean?
How do you say 'the tickets are already sorted'?
What does 非常好看 mean?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 波伏娃，你看过那部电影吗？
lines.pinyin: Bō Fú Wá, nǐ kàn guò nà bù diàn yǐng ma?
lines.english: Beauvoir, have you seen that movie?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 看过！我以前看过两次，非常好看！
lines.pinyin: Kàn guò! Wǒ yǐ qián kàn guò liǎng cì, fēi cháng hǎo kàn!
lines.english: I have! I've seen it twice before; it's extremely good!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真的吗？你觉得最有意思的是哪里？
lines.pinyin: Zhēn de ma? Nǐ jué de zuì yǒu yì si de shì nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Really? What part do you think is most interesting?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 不管看多少次，我都觉得结局最有意思。
lines.pinyin: Bù guǎn kàn duō shǎo cì, wǒ dōu jué de jié jú zuì yǒu yì si.
lines.english: No matter how many times I watch it, I always find the ending most interesting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我已经买票了，今晚去看，你去不去？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yǐ jīng mǎi piào le, jīn wǎn qù kàn, nǐ qù bú qù?
lines.english: I've already bought a ticket to see it tonight. Are you coming?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 去！虽然我看过了，但是我想再看一次！
lines.pinyin: Qù! Suī rán wǒ kàn guò le, dàn shì wǒ xiǎng zài kàn yí cì!
lines.english: I'll go! Even though I've seen it, I want to watch it one more time!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你没看过这部电影吗？真有意思！
lines.pinyin: Nǐ méi kàn guò zhè bù diàn yǐng ma? Zhēn yǒu yì si!
lines.english: You haven't seen this movie? It's really interesting!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没有，我以前不喜欢看电影。
lines.pinyin: Méi yǒu, wǒ yǐ qián bù xǐ huan kàn diàn yǐng.
lines.english: No, I didn't like watching movies before.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不管你喜不喜欢，这部你一定要看！
lines.pinyin: Bù guǎn nǐ xǐ bù xǐ huan, zhè bù nǐ yí dìng yào kàn!
lines.english: No matter whether you like movies or not, you must see this one!

lines.speaker: B
lines.pinyin: Hǎo ba, piào duō shǎo qián yì zhāng?
lines.english: Okay, how much is a ticket?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 不贵，我已经买票了，你的票我帮你买了，我请你看。
lines.pinyin: Bú guì, wǒ yǐ jīng mǎi hǎo le, nǐ de piào wǒ bāng nǐ mǎi le, wǒ qǐng nǐ kàn.
lines.english: Not expensive. I've already bought them; I bought your ticket for you and it's my treat.
